data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Designs elements are optimized according to user interaction efficiency principles.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Limits choices to streamline and speed up decision-making processes.
data.technical_spec: Simplified user interfaces, focused navigation paths

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users' expectations are aligned with their habitual interaction patterns.
data.technical_spec: Consistency with other Microsoft interfaces and industry standards

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together to improve comprehension.
data.technical_spec: SEO-optimized content layout, grouped visual elements

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Information is presented in chunks to enhance memorability.
data.technical_spec: Use of sections and collapsible menus
